prose:
**O₂ frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density fitting on) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3. Geometry: single-point on the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz` (not re-optimized at the DFT level). SCF converged in 7 cycles; no warnings reported. HOMO = –8.8739616 eV, LUMO = –3.5859031 eV → **gap = 5.2880586 eV**.  

Command:  
```  
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier   --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 3   /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz   --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp4u793yc1/live.json
```  
Result JSON written to  
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp4u793yc1/live.json`  
Live log streaming to `frontier_<timestamp>.out` in the working directory (you can `tail -f` it).
